name: Overland Storage, Inc.
description: Overland-Tandberg is a global provider of unified data management and data protection solutions, serving a wide range of markets including enterprise, SME, and SMB sectors. The company specializes in archive solutions, including its proprietary RDX removable disk technology, NEO tape archive systems, and customized server configurations. With a history spanning over four decades, it operates through a massive worldwide channel network of distributors and resellers, delivering reliable, secure, and high-performance storage technology to help organizations manage data lifecycles and protect against modern digital threats like ransomware and malware.
